mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatbot_intake_slot (conversation_id, user_id, application_case_id, mode, original_query, fetched_cases) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{mode}, #{originalQuery}, #{fetchedCases}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = VALUES(user_id), application_case_id = VALUES(application_case_id), mode = VALUES(mode), original_query = VALUES(original_query), fetched_cases = VALUES(fetched_cases)
mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id AS conversationId, user_id AS userId, application_case_id AS applicationCaseId, mode AS mode, original_query AS originalQuery, fetched_cases AS fetchedCases FROM chatbot_intake_slot WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
